creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
xeyes installed by x11/xeyes does not run at all,
	after upgrade to xorg 7.5.
	It dies involving whole X session.

Fix: 

I have no idea.
	Someone says the same thing in ports@.
How-To-Repeat: 	% portupgrade -a
	(everything including xorg and xeyes)
	% xdm
	...
	When I login via xdm, I immediately forced to logout (return back to the
	initial xdm screen).
	I omit xeyes from my .xinitrc, I can login.
	I run xeyes then, I forced to logout again.
